description: A property manager needs to enter a tenant's unit for a non-emergency reason (e.g., preventative maintenance).

nodes.task_description: Identify the tenant and the reason for entry.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the unit and purpose of the visit.

nodes.task_description: Generate a formal 'Notice to Enter' document, specifying the date, time window, and reason.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a legally compliant notice.

nodes.task_description: Deliver the notice to the tenant according to state law (e.g., post on the door and mail).

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the delivery of the notice.
